TH_YUYUKO-YUKARI_HELP.title: Friend's Help
TH_YUYUKO-YUKARI_HELP.pages.INITIAL.desc:
Walking toward the top of the tower, you suddenly notice the scenery ahead ripple like a stone dropped into water.

Then, a [purple]purple gap[/purple] opens in front of you, and [purple]Yukari Yakumo[/purple] leans out with her usual smile:

"[fade_in]Yuyuko, climbing the tower is so tiring. Want to play a little game? Tell me what you want, give me any random thing, and maybe it will really appear~[/fade_in]"
TH_YUYUKO-YUKARI_HELP.pages.SELECT_RELIC:
"[fade_in]Is that really possible, Yukari?[/fade_in]"

You hand [gold]{RandomRelic}[/gold] to [purple]Yukari Yakumo[/purple], and the gap silently swallows its weight.

Then, the [gold]relic[/gold] you wanted appears in your hand out of nowhere.
"[fade_in]Is that really possible, Yukari?[/fade_in]"

You hand [red]{RandomCard}[/red] into the gap.

Then, [purple]Yukari Yakumo[/purple] produces that card like a magic trick and hands it to you.
TH_YUYUKO-YUKARI_HELP.pages.SELECT_POTIO:
"[fade_in]Is that really possible, Yukari?[/fade_in]"

You hand [red]{RandomPotion}[/red] into the gap.

Then, [purple]Yukari Yakumo[/purple] produces that potion like a magic trick and hands it to you.
TH_YUYUKO-DINNERHALL.title: Mystia's Izakaya
TH_YUYUKO-DINNERHALL.pages.INITIAL.descr:
Night falls, and you smell an enticing aroma.

Following the scent, you find a small brightly lit shop with its door open against the wall.

"[fade_in]Welcome~ Mystia's Izakaya![/fade_in]"

The owner, Mystia, looks up from wiping a bowl, giving you a brilliant smile.

Your stomach conveniently growls.
TH_YUYUKO-DINNERHALL.pages.ORDER.descrip:
"[fade_in]Bring me all your best dishes![/fade_in]"

You say this, and Mystia obediently brings out bowl after bowl of food.

The taste is naturally excellent, but when you pay, you realize you spent exactly all your money, which irritates you a bit.
TH_YUYUKO-DINNERHALL.pages.INITIAL.optio: I want to eat small bones
Gain [green]15[/green] Max HP. Add a [red]Shame[/red] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-DINNERHALL.pages.EAT_BIRD.desc:
You stare at Mystia without blinking and say those words.

The air freezes for half a second, then Mystia visibly panics.

"[jitter][red]W-wait! Don't eat me! I have lots of bones and my meat isn't tasty. You can eat anything here for free![/red][/jitter]"

In a fluster, she quickly brings out dish after dish, leaving you fully satisfied, and in the end she dares not charge you.
TH_YUYUKO-DINNERHALL.pages.LEAVE.descrip:
Though you'd like to eat something, you decide you're not that hungry yet and can hold on.

You force your gaze away from the menu and leave the izakaya.
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_TO_BLOOM.title: The Saigyou Ayakashi About to Bloom
As you advance deeper into the tower and gather more [gold]Spring[/gold], you can clearly feel the previously sealed [purple]Saigyou Ayakashi[/purple] becoming [jitter]more active[/jitter], showing signs of breaking its seal and fully blooming.

What do you do?
TH_YUYUKO-SAKURA_TO_BLOOM.pages.BOOST.de:
You do nothing to stop it.

Before long, it fully blooms, and the girl buried beneath revives—[jitter]that was your former self[/jitter].

However, revival comes at a [red]cost[/red]. Your body has [purple]decayed[/purple] with time, and even with the mark of the [purple]Saigyou Ayakashi[/purple], you can only linger in this world temporarily.
A mysterious feeling tells you not to let the [purple]Saigyou Ayakashi[/purple] bloom, or something bad will happen.

So you exhaust yourself to prevent its blooming. Your body seems to change as you consume your own life force (if ghosts have such a thing), becoming more like a normal ghost.
TH_YUYUKO-HERMIT.title: The Retired Youki
TH_YUYUKO-HERMIT.pages.INITIAL.descripti:
Before you know it, you've reached an out-of-the-way room.

By the flickering candlelight, you see a familiar aged figure sitting in a corner, leafing through yellowed scrolls.

"[fade_in]...Youki? What are you doing here?[/fade_in]"

He looks up, seemingly unsurprised to see you.

"[fade_in]I once followed a master swordsman here. It's a long story... But since you're here, Lady Saigyouji, why not learn a thing or two before you leave?[/fade_in]"
TH_YUYUKO-HERMIT.pages.REVIEW.descriptio:
You follow Youki in breaking down and reviewing old techniques.

Many previously ambiguous details become clear, and your skills grow more polished.
TH_YUYUKO-HERMIT.pages.TRASFORM.descript:
Youki suggests several different approaches.

You try to rebuild old techniques from scratch, eventually obtaining better forms.
TH_YUYUKO-HERMIT.pages.REMOVE.descriptio:
"[fade_in]Unnecessary movements only slow you down.[/fade_in]"

Under Youki's guidance, you decisively discard redundant actions, making your techniques more crisp and clean.
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_MOTO.title: Encounter Byakuren
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_MOTO.pages.INITIAL.descri:
You hear the sharp screech of tires against the ground in the distance.

The next moment, a figure in a monk's robe practically "zooms" in front of you—[gold]Byakuren Hijiri[/gold] stops her motorcycle steadily right before you.

"[fade_in]Benefactor, care to ride together?[/fade_in]"

She puts her palms together and smiles, as if this path was always meant to be traveled at high speed.
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_MOTO.pages.COMMUNICATE.de:
"[fade_in]No thanks, I have things to do on the way. I won't trouble you.[/fade_in]"

You decline politely, then briefly discuss Buddhist teachings with Byakuren, gaining deeper insights.
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_MOTO.pages.INITIAL.option: Teleport directly to the [purple]BOSS[/purple] room of this act.
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_MOTO.pages.TAKE.descripti:
"[fade_in]Please do.[/fade_in]"

You nod and sit behind Byakuren.

The wind and Buddhist chants fade away together. After a dizzying spin, your vision clears—you've reached the end of this floor.
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_EIKI.title: Encounter Eiki
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_EIKI.pages.INITIAL.descri:
At the end of a long corridor, you suddenly see a girl holding a golden rod of repentance, wearing a navy blue sleeveless jacket—it's [green]Eiki Shiki[/green].

The moment she looks up, [jitter]you know you've been spotted[/jitter].

"[fade_in][jitter][purple]Yuyuko Saigyouji[/purple][/jitter][/fade_in]"

Her voice is not loud, but it strikes your heart like a hammer.

"[fade_in]Shouldn't you be in the Netherworld—[/fade_in]"
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_EIKI.pages.RUN.descriptio:
Before she finishes, you decisively turn and flee.

Behind you comes a soft sigh, followed by a spine-chilling pressure.

You barely escape her sight, but not without cost.
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_EIKI.pages.INITIAL.option:
Remove [blue]3[/blue] cards.
Add a [red]Distress[/red] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_YUYUKO-MEET_EIKI.pages.LISTEN.descrip:
You take a deep breath and choose not to leave, instead listening obediently to her lecture.

The Enma opens her scrolls and points out your flaws one by one.

... ...

... ...

After the long lecture ends, you finally breathe a sigh of relief. Though the words left your mind a bit foggy, they addressed real issues, and correcting them will greatly benefit you.
